overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town with half-timbered houses, entering a dark candlelit guildhall interior with statues and columns, and exiting to continue through cobblestone streets and up a ramp.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street toward the large stone guildhall entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking in the opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: large stone building with multiple arched doorways and decorative masonry
wet cobblestone pavement with wooden drainage channels
rough wooden posts and rails lining the right side of the path
traditional medieval timber-framed buildings with plaster infill

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moody, overcast evening in a medieval town. Geralt walks along a cobblestone street toward an imposing stone guildhall, passing a woman in a green dress. The atmosphere is damp and desaturated, with half-timbered houses visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered arcade with brick columns and candlelight

events.description: character enters the guildhall from the outdoor street through a large arched doorway
ambient light shifts from natural overcast to dim interior candlelight

agents.ego_description: walking through the arched entrance into the dark interior corridor

entered.detail: series of repeating brick arches forming a covered walkway
thick cylindrical stone columns supporting the arched ceiling
lit candles mounted on the walls providing warm orange illumination
large carved wooden door visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the outdoor street into a dimly lit interior corridor. The space is defined by heavy stone pillars and brick arches, illuminated only by flickering wall sconces. The atmosphere becomes enclosed and mysterious as the outdoor world disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular hall with statues in niches and ascending stairs

events.description: space opens into a larger circular chamber with statues in wall niches
character begins ascending stone stairs toward the exit archway

agents.ego_description: moving through the circular hall, examining the statues, then ascending the stairs toward the exit

entered.detail: recessed wall niches containing stone statues illuminated by candles
curved stone steps ascending to an upper exit
bright daylight visible through the distant exit arch

segments.scene_description: Inside the guildhall's main chamber, the character explores a circular space lined with statues in niches. The environment is dark and atmospheric, lit by candles. The character approaches a large wooden door, then turns to ascend a curved stone staircase toward a bright exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with half-timbered buildings and ascending ramp

events.description: character exits the guildhall back to the outdoor town environment
emerging from candlelight back to natural overcast daylight
turning left onto an ascending cobblestone ramp alongside a stone wall

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and continuing through the town streets, passing townsfolk and ascending a ramp

notable_agents.action: woman pushing a wooden cart up the cobblestone street ahead of the character

entered.detail: octagonal timber-framed building with red roof and multiple stories
steeply inclined cobblestone path with drainage channels
solid stone parapet wall with crenellations along the left side
iron bracket with lit torch mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the guildhall, the character returns to the overcast town streets, passing a distinctive octagonal market building. The scene follows the character as they navigate through narrow streets, pass a woman with a cart, and begin ascending a steep cobblestone ramp flanked by stone walls and torch lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a damp, overcast medieval street into the depths of a candlelit guildhall before returning to the open town. It begins with Geralt walking along a desaturated cobblestone street past half-timbered houses and a woman in a green dress, moving steadily toward an imposing stone building. As he enters the guildhall, the open air gives way to an enclosed, mysterious corridor of heavy stone pillars and brick arches lit by flickering wall sconces. The scene then shifts into a dark, circular main chamber lined with statues in niches, where the character navigates by candlelight before ascending a curved stone staircase toward a bright exit archway. Finally, the camera emerges back into the moody evening light, passing an octagonal market building and a woman with a cart before climbing a steep cobblestone ramp flanked by stone walls and torch lamps.
